description: A screenshot of a social-media post (Truth Social / X style) by 'Donald J. Trump', verified handle @realDonaldTrump, with a circular profile avatar of a stylized red, white, and blue American-flag portrait. The layout is a plain white card with black body text and the standard account header (name, pink or red verified check, and a black badge icon). Full verbatim text: 'Tonight, at my direction, brave American forces and the Armed Forces of Nigeria flawlessly executed a meticulously planned and very complex mission to eliminate the most active terrorist in the world from the battlefield. Abu-Bilal al-Minuki, second in command of ISIS globally, thought he could hide in Africa, but little did he know we had sources who kept us informed on what he was doing. He will no longer terrorize the people of Africa, or help plan operations to target Americans. With his removal, ISIS's global operation is greatly diminished. Thank you to the Government of Nigeria for your partnership on this operation. GOD BLESS AMERICA! President DONALD J. TRUMP'.
notable_text: brave American forces and the Armed Forces of Nigeria flawlessly executed a meticulously planned and very complex mission to eliminate the most active terrorist in the world; GOD BLESS AMERICA! President DONALD J. TRUMP
